title: cyperus wilburii
intro: Cyperus wilburii, also known as East African flat sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cyperus wilburii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
